text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi brings me magazine articles on
the Twinkle Star Climax to show me how publicity
efforts are going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taken aback at the scale of the event, I eagerly
flip through the articles and find one on
<chrname> alongside other eminent
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're not there yet, though. We need to keep
forging ahead if we want to enter the Twinkle Star
Climax!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> and I vow to both do our
best and aim for the title of "greatest"!
